name: Equifax Data & Analytics API
what_it_does: Equifax Data & Analytics REST API for consumer credit data, identity verification, income verification, and risk analytics. Enables AI agents to manage consumer credit report and credit score retrieval for credit decisioning automation, handle income and employment verification from The Work Number for lending automation, access identity verification and fraud risk scoring for onboarding automation, retrieve small business credit data for commercial credit decisioning, manage tenant screening data for property management automation, handle credit monitoring and alert services for consumer financial health, access custom risk models and credit analytics for portfolio management, retrieve mortgage industry data and property analytics for real estate lending, manage pre-qualification and soft inquiry data for prescreening automation, and integrate Equifax with loan origination, property management, and financial services platforms.
use_cases: Pulling credit reports from lending decision agents
Verifying employment from income verification agents
Screening tenants from property management agents
Scoring fraud risk from identity verification agents
not_for: Non-permissible purpose credit pulls without FCRA basis
Non-financial services without credit or identity context
Consumer self-service without FCRA permissible purpose
best_when: A lender, property manager, fintech, or employer wanting AI agents to automate credit decisioning, income verification, identity fraud screening, and tenant screening under FCRA-permissible purpose.
avoid_when: FCRA PERMISSIBLE PURPOSE MANDATORY: Every automated Equifax credit data access requires documented FCRA permissible purpose (credit transaction, employment, housing, insurance underwriting); automated credit pulls without permissible purpose are federal FCRA violations with statutory damages of $100-$1,000 per violation plus punitive damages. FCRA ADVERSE ACTION REQUIREMENTS: Automated credit-based denials require FCRA adverse action notice with Equifax credit report copy, dispute rights, and credit score disclosure; automated denial without adverse action notice creates federal FCRA violation. 2017 EQUIFAX BREACH LEGACY: Equifax suffered a massive breach (145.5M records, 2017); automated integrations must use current Equifax API security controls; verify current security posture before building production integrations. Equifax state credit freeze obligations — automated credit pulls must respect state credit freeze and security freeze status; automated pulls on frozen files create FCRA violation. EEOC employment verification constraints — automated employment verification (The Work Number) for hiring decisions must comply with EEOC guidance on credit checks in employment; state laws prohibit employment credit checks in 11+ states.

auth.notes: Equifax uses OAuth 2.0 with scopes. REST API with JSON. Atlanta, Georgia HQ. NYSE: EFX. Founded 1899. Public company. Revenue $5.3B+ (2023). One of the three major US credit bureaus. The Work Number (income/employment verification). 2017 data breach (145.5M records). Developer portal at developer.equifax.com. FCRA-regulated. Competes with Experian and TransUnion for consumer credit data.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — per-inquiry pricing with commercial agreement
pricing.notes: Atlanta, Georgia. NYSE: EFX. Founded 1899. Public. $5.3B+ revenue. Major US credit bureau. Work Number employment data. 2017 breach legacy.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; burst limits per contract

known_agent_gotchas: FCRA PERMISSIBLE PURPOSE MANDATORY: Every automated credit pull MUST have documented FCRA permissible purpose before API call; automated credit queries without permissible purpose are federal FCRA violations — implement permissible purpose verification as first step in any automated credit workflow

FCRA ADVERSE ACTION NOTICE: Automated credit-based denials require FCRA-compliant adverse action notice within required timeframe including credit report, score, dispute rights, and credit score range disclosure; automated denial without notice creates federal FCRA violation with statutory damages

State credit freeze enforcement — automated credit pulls must query state freeze status before hard inquiry; automated pulls on security-frozen files create FCRA violation; implement freeze check before all automated hard inquiries
2017 breach security due diligence — Equifax suffered catastrophic 2017 breach; verify current Equifax API security controls meet organizational risk standards before production deployment

Employment credit check state prohibitions — automated employment screening using Equifax credit data is prohibited in 11+ states (CA, CO, CT, DC, DE, HI, IL, MD, NV, OR, VT, WA); automated employment credit check without state law verification creates state discrimination violation

Work Number employment data freshness — automated income/employment verification through Work Number may have employer data reporting lag (payroll cycles); automated lending decisions on stale employment data create verification inaccuracy
agent_readiness.security_notes: Credit bureau. SOC2, PCI-DSS. OAuth2 with scopes. US. Consumer credit and employment data. FCRA-regulated.

security_score_components.security_notes: Credit bureau. SOC2, PCI-DSS. OAuth2 with scopes. US. Consumer credit data. FCRA-regulated.
